reforms.description: The Hungarian government has implemented a series of measures aimed at promoting innovation, including a cut in the corporate income tax rate from 18% to 16% and proposals to abolish local business taxation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Lowering corporate taxes is expected to enhance business investment and innovation activities, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The corporate income tax rate was officially reduced in 2004.
reforms.importance_rationale: The tax reforms represent a significant change in the business taxation landscape, aimed at fostering a more conducive environment for innovation.
reforms.source_quote: For example a cut in the corporate income tax rate from 18% to 16% was made in 2004, and currently there are proposals to abolish local business taxation.

reforms.description: The Hungarian government has introduced a scheme to provide financial support for innovative SMEs in collaboration with the Hungarian Development Bank, addressing the low levels of venture capital investment in the country.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative aims to enhance access to finance for innovative SMEs, thereby fostering entrepreneurship and innovation in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The government is countering the problem with a scheme to provide financial support for innovative SMEs.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform addresses a significant barrier to innovation for SMEs, which is access to finance, and is expected to have a meaningful impact on the startup ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: The government is countering this problem with a scheme, run in conjunction with the Hungarian Development Bank, to provide financial support for innovative SMEs.

reforms.description: Regulatory changes have been made to facilitate the establishment of university spin-off companies and allow researchers to be seconded to the private sector, enhancing collaboration between academia and industry.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These changes are designed to strengthen the links between research institutions and the private sector, promoting the commercialization of research outputs.
reforms.status_evidence: Under legislation introduced this year, universities can now set up a spin-off company without applying for government approval.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform enhances the capacity for knowledge transfer and commercialization of research, which is crucial for innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The introduction of lighter regulations on university spin-off companies... has been a key step to increase commercially oriented research.

reforms.description: The Agency for Research Fund Management and Research Exploitations (KPI) was established to finance R&D and innovation projects through an open tender system funded by the Innovation Fund, promoting public-private partnerships and providing advisory services.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By financing R&D and innovation projects, the KPI enhances collaboration between public and private sectors, fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The KPI has been operational since its establishment.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the KPI represents a significant structural change in Hungary's approach to managing R&D funding and innovation, enhancing the effectiveness of public-private collaboration.
reforms.source_quote: The Agency for Research Fund Management and Research Exploitations (KPI) has the following roles: Financing R&D and innovation projects through a system of open tender funded by the Innovation Fund.

reforms.description: The Smart Hungary Programme was introduced to provide tax and support schemes aimed at encouraging investment, with various elements tailored to suit investor needs, including tax-related incentives and support for high-value-added activities.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing investments and supporting high-value activities, the programme aims to stimulate economic growth and innovation in Hungary.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been operational since its introduction.
reforms.importance_rationale: The Smart Hungary Programme represents a comprehensive approach to fostering investment and innovation, significantly impacting the economic landscape.
reforms.source_quote: The Smart Hungary Programme is a term used by the Hungarian authorities for tax and support schemes aimed at encouraging investment.

reforms.description: The Hungarian government is prioritizing innovation policy by implementing targeted measures to support innovation, with a focus on improving public research funding and the general business environment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing innovation capabilities is expected to boost productivity and economic growth by fostering a more dynamic business environment.
reforms.status_evidence: The government is putting strong emphasis on targeted measures to support innovation.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in government policy towards fostering innovation, which is crucial for long-term economic growth and competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: Innovation policy has become a key priority for the government.

reforms.description: The Hungarian government has established a new decision-making structure to enhance innovation, focusing on commercially sustainable R&D grants funded through a special levy on businesses, with an emphasis on applied research with strong commercial potential.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing funding for applied research with commercial potential, the reform aims to stimulate innovation and economic growth through enhanced R&D activities.
reforms.status_evidence: The government is paying special attention to innovation and has outlined specific measures.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in how R&D funding is allocated, aiming to enhance the commercial viability of research and stimulate innovation across sectors.
reforms.source_quote: The government is paying special attention to innovation... R&D grants are being funded through a new special levy on businesses and grant allocation for applied research is focusing more on research with strong commercial potential.

reforms.description: Regulatory changes have been implemented to facilitate the creation of spin-off companies from universities, aiming to enhance the commercialization of research outputs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By easing regulations for university spin-offs, the reform encourages the transfer of knowledge and technology from academia to the market, fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Regulatory changes have made it easier for universities to create spin-off companies.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it enhances the commercialization potential of university research, although it is part of a broader initiative rather than a standalone major reform.
reforms.source_quote: Regulatory changes have made it easier for universities to create spin-off companies.

reforms.description: The Hungarian government has proposed reforms to the Hungarian Academy of Science (HAS) to enhance its collaboration with the private sector by linking research evaluation to business partnerships and budget allocations.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering collaboration between HAS and businesses, the reform aims to enhance the relevance and application of research, thereby supporting innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has proposed reforms to strengthen HAS's link with business.
reforms.importance_rationale: The proposed reforms represent a significant adjustment to the evaluation and funding mechanisms of HAS, which could enhance its role in innovation.
reforms.source_quote: One way of helping HAS reform would be to raise the importance of joint work with business in evaluating HAS’s research activities.

reforms.description: The government has initiated reforms in tertiary and vocational education to better align educational outcomes with labor market demands, which is crucial for fostering innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving the alignment of education with market needs, the reform aims to enhance the skill set of graduates, thereby supporting innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Further reform efforts should include... consultation between the tertiary sector and business on the content and mix of courses.
reforms.importance_rationale: These reforms are significant adjustments aimed at enhancing the responsiveness of the education system to labor market needs, which is vital for innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The introduction of shorter and more vocational degrees... that strengthen responsiveness of tertiary education are welcome.

reforms.description: The Hungarian government has initiated a focus on innovation policy as part of a broader strategy to enhance the business environment, which includes the establishment of a National Innovation System and the National Innovation Fund.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of a structured approach to innovation is expected to enhance R&D activity and improve the overall business climate, fostering economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government began to announce a large number of structural reform measures – collectively called the Hundred Steps programme.
reforms.importance_rationale: The creation of a National Innovation System represents a significant structural change aimed at improving innovation capacity and R&D activity in Hungary, which is crucial for economic development.
reforms.source_quote: The Hungarian government has recently been focusing on innovation policy as part of a wider campaign to improve the business environment.

reforms.description: The Innovation Fund, which began operating in 2004, is a new method of funding grants for R&D projects and other innovation programmes, financed by a turnover-based levy on businesses and matching government transfers.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to enhance R&D investment by providing financial support, thereby fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Innovation Fund began operating in 2004.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the Innovation Fund represents a significant structural change in how R&D is financed in Hungary, promoting a more sustainable innovation ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: The Innovation Fund, which began operating in 2004, is a novel way of funding grants for R&D projects and other innovation programmes.

reforms.description: Tax breaks for R&D expenditure have been increased, allowing firms to deduct 100% of R&D spending from their corporate tax base, significantly enhancing the incentives for R&D investment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing tax deductions for R&D, the reform incentivizes firms to invest more in research activities, which can lead to greater innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: Tax-breaks on R&D expenditure have been increased in recent years.
reforms.importance_rationale: The increase in tax breaks represents a significant enhancement of existing incentives for R&D, encouraging more firms to engage in innovative activities.
reforms.source_quote: Tax-breaks on R&D expenditure have been increased in recent years.

reforms.description: The Hungarian government has established a new National Innovation System, which includes the Science and Technology Board and the National Office for Research and Technology, aimed at overseeing the implementation of the government's R&D strategy and managing the Research and Technology Innovation Fund.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of a structured governance framework for R&D is expected to enhance coordination and effectiveness in innovation policy, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The new National Innovation System has been established and is operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the governance of innovation policy in Hungary, aiming to improve the effectiveness of R&D funding and management.
reforms.source_quote: The decision-making and administrative framework for innovation policies has been changed significantly over the past couple of years.
